description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-7 Docker image for all jobs, caches the Maven repository at /root/.m2/repository/, and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a validate:jdk7 job in the build stage that runs the exact command "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile". Add a verify:jdk7 job in the test stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test" and is excluded from the master branch (except: master). Add a jar:jdk7 job in the deploy stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS package", runs only on the master branch, and publishes the files matching target/*.jar as artifacts.
